---
title: "Factor Analysis"
---

# Overview

<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/factor-analysis-pca.html>

# Confirmatory Factor Analysis (CFA)

Overview:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/factor-analysis-pca.html#sec-cfa>

Code examples:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/factor-analysis-pca.html#sec-cfaExamples>

# Exploratory Factor Analysis (EFA)

Overview:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/factor-analysis-pca.html#sec-efa>

Code examples:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/factor-analysis-pca.html#sec-efaExamples>

# Multigroup Models

Overview:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/test-bias.html#sec-measurementInvariance>

Code examples:
<https://isaactpetersen.github.io/Principles-Psychological-Assessment/test-bias.html#sec-measurementInvarianceConfiguralSyntax>
